D

DatabaseManager - Class in Unnamed Package
Manages all SQLite database operations for the Classroom Booking System.
DatabaseManager() - Constructor for class DatabaseManager
Creates a DatabaseManager and connects to SQLite.
delete(int) - Method in class Admin
OOP: Interface Implementation — delete a resource.
delete(int) - Method in interface Manageable
Delete an existing resource.
deleteBooking(int) - Method in class DatabaseManager
Deletes a booking from the database.
deleteClassroom(int) - Method in class BookingSystem
Deletes a classroom and all its bookings (Admin only).
deleteClassroom(int) - Method in class DatabaseManager
Deletes a classroom from the database.
